name: hostshift
description: Plan and perform read-only-source Ubuntu and Debian server migrations.

interface.shortDescription: Migrate Ubuntu and Debian servers without changing the source.
interface.longDescription: Discovers Ubuntu and Debian web servers, builds reviewable migration profiles, prepares clean targets, streams data without writing to the source, and verifies cutovers.
defaultPrompt: Discover a source server without changing it.
Build a reviewed HostShift migration plan.
